Skip to contents
factoRverse 0.6.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog
  • FactorOps map

Package index

Data structures & meta objects

The self-documenting S4 containers at the heart of the package. meta_dataframe (long panels) and meta_xts (wide time series) carry a workflow log, metadata, and structural validation, and specialise into the objects each workflow consumes and produces.

create_meta_dataframe()
Create a meta_dataframe
create_meta_xts()
Create a meta_xts Object (returns_meta_xts or metrics_meta_xts)
update_meta_dataframe()
Update meta_dataframe by appending a batch
is_meta_dataframe()
Check if an object is a meta_dataframe
is_coercible_to_meta_dataframe()
Check if an object is coercible to meta_dataframe
get_data()
Accessor for Data Slot
get_workflow()
Accessor for Workflow Slot
get_dates()
Accessor for Dates
get_tickers()
Accessor for Tickers
meta_dataframe-class meta_dataframe
meta_dataframe-class
meta_xts-class
An S4 Class Storing a Time Series Plus Metadata
returns_meta_xts-class
An S4 Subclass of meta_xts for Return Series (No Holes Allowed)
metrics_meta_xts-class
An S4 Subclass of meta_xts for Metric Series (Holes Allowed)
raw_features_m_df-class raw_features_m_df
raw_features_m_df-class
signals_m_df-class signals_m_df
signals_m_df-class
groups_m_df-class groups_m_df
groups_m_df-class
weights_m_df-class weights_m_df
weights_m_df-class
stock_universe_m_df-class stock_universe_m_df
stock_universe_m_df-class
oos_sb_outputs_m_df-class oos_sb_outputs_m_df
oos_sb_outputs_m_df-class
feature_importance_m_df-class feature_importance_m_df
feature_importance_m_df-class

Tickers catalog & survivorship

Track ticker lifecycle events (listings, delistings, renames) with stable permanent identifiers, and build a survivorship-aware panel.

create_tickers_catalog()
Create a tickers_catalog Object
update_tickers_catalog()
Update a tickers_catalog Object
read_tickers_catalog()
Apply tickers_catalog Transformations
lookup_catalog()
Lookup method for tickers_catalog
tickers_catalog-class tickers_catalog
tickers_catalog-class

Feature engineering & targets

Construct point-in-time characteristics from the factor-zoo literature (rolling and seasonal windows, formulas, composite scores, sector-wise metrics, cross-sectional / time-series combinations, sector-specific mappings), and build forward, risk-adjusted prediction targets.

compute_window()
Compute Rolling or Seasonal Calculations for a Given Metric in meta_dataframe or meta_xts
compute_formula()
Compute Formula-Based Signal Calculation
compute_score()
Compute Score Based on Conditions
compute_across()
Compute Across: Apply a Calculation Between meta_dataframe and meta_xts
compute_sector_wise()
Compute Sector-Wise Calculation for a Given Signal in a meta_dataframe
compute_sector_map()
Compute Sector-Based Column Transformations
compute_sector_map_across()
Compute Sector-Based Mapped Values Across a Meta XTS
create_target_m_df()
Build target_m_df for forward horizons
target_m_df-class target_m_df
target_m_df-class

Signal & statistic primitives

The low-level building blocks used by the compute_* functions and the portfolio engine: benchmark regressions, momentum / volatility statistics, and signal transformation.

alpha_bench()
Calculate Alpha Relative to a Benchmark
alpha_tstat_bench()
Compute the t-Statistic of Alpha Relative to a Benchmark
beta_bench()
Calculate Beta Relative to a Benchmark
correlation_bench()
Calculate Correlation with a Benchmark
res_mom()
Calculate Residual Momentum Score
idio_vol()
Calculate Idiosyncratic Volatility
skew()
Calculate Skewness of a Numeric Vector
sur()
Calculate Standardized Unexpected Realization (SUR)
cagr()
Calculate Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR)
geometric_mean_return()
Geometric Mean Return (percentage-point scale)
count_if()
Count elements that satisfy a condition
signal_transform()
Signal Transformation Function
relative_risk_contribution()
Calculate Relative Risk Contribution

Point-in-time preprocessing

Apply a recipes preprocessing pipeline one date at a time so no future information leaks into the past, plus custom recipe steps for winsorization and sector-mean imputation.

map_recipe_timewise()
Map a Recipe to Sequential Dates
step_winsorize()
Step for Winsorization
step_impute_sector()
Add step_impute_sector to a Recipe
step_winsorize_new()
Constructor for step_winsorize
step_impute_sector_new()
Constructor for step_impute_sector
required_pkgs.step_winsorize()
Required Packages for step_winsorize
required_pkgs.step_impute_sector()
Required Packages for step_impute_sector
bake(<step_winsorize>)
Apply winsorization during baking
bake(<step_impute_sector>)
Apply imputation during baking
prep(<step_winsorize>)
Prepare Method for step_winsorize
prep(<step_impute_sector>)
Prepare Method for step_impute_sector
tidy(<step_winsorize>)
Tidy method for step_winsorize
tidy(<step_impute_sector>)
Tidy Method for step_impute_sector
print(<step_winsorize>)
Print Method for step_winsorize
print(<step_impute_sector>)
Print Method for step_impute_sector

Screening

Filter the investable universe by feature values, logical conditions, or liquidity.

screen_by_feature()
Screen (select) features from a meta_dataframe
screen_by_feature(<meta_dataframe>)
Method for selecting features from a meta_dataframe
screen_by_conditions()
Screen (filter) a meta_dataframe by row-wise conditions
screen_by_conditions(<meta_dataframe>)
Method for screening a meta_dataframe based on conditions
screen_by_liquidity()
Generic function for screening a meta_dataframe based on liquidity classification, given a liquidity_floor_rule.

Workflow 1: Characteristic-portfolio backtesting

Rank stocks on a characteristic, invest in the top quantile, and backtest the resulting long-only portfolio. Aggregate many backtests into a cohort to compare them as a group.

create_port_backtest_config()
Create port_backtest_config Object
run_port_backtest()
Run Portfolio Backtest
update_port_backtest()
Update Portfolio Backtest The update_port_backtest function will take an existing port_backtest_results object and update it with new dates. This function is useful when you want to add new dates to an existing backtest without having to re-run the entire backtest.
create_port_backtest_cohort()
Create Portfolio Backtest Cohort
port_backtest_config-class
Class for Port Backtest Config
port_backtest_results-class
S4 Class for Portfolio Backtest Results
port_backtest_cohort-class
S4 Class for Portfolio Backtest Cohort

Constraints, liquidity & transaction costs

Composable policy builders attached to a config with add_*(): liquidity floors and caps, turnover buffers, concentration limits, covariance estimation, and a BARRA-style transaction-cost model.

add_liquidity_floor_cutoffs()
Add Liquidity Floor Cutoffs
create_liquidity_floor_cutoffs()
Create Liquidity Floor Cutoffs
get_liquidity_floor_cutoffs()
Accessor for Liquidity Floor Cutoffs
add_liquidity_constraint_policy()
Add Liquidity Constraint Policy
create_liquidity_constraint_policy()
Create Liquidity Constraint Policy
get_liquidity_constraint_policy()
Accessor for Liquidity Constraint Policy
add_turnover_constraint_policy()
Add Turnover Constraint Policy
create_turnover_constraint_policy()
Create Turnover Constraint Policy
get_turnover_constraint_policy()
Accessor for Turnover Constraint Policy
add_concentration_constraint_policy()
Add Concentration Constraint Policy
create_concentration_constraint_policy()
Create Concentration Constraint Policy
get_concentration_constraint_policy()
Get the Concentration Constraint Policy
add_transaction_costs_parameters()
Add Transaction Cost Parameters to a Portfolio Backtest Configuration
create_transaction_costs_parameters()
Create a New Transaction Cost Parameters Object
get_transaction_costs_parameters()
Accessor for Transaction Cost Parameters
validate_transaction_costs_parameters()
Validate Transaction Cost Parameters
add_cov_est_method()
Add covariance estimation method to a backtest configuration
create_cov_est_method()
Create Covariance Estimation Method
is_portfolio_policies()
Define the is portfolio_policies function
liquidity_constraint_policy-class
Liquidity Constraint Policy
turnover_constraint_policy-class
Turnover Constraint Policy
concentration_constraint_policy-class
Concentration Constraint Policy
transaction_costs_parameters-class
Transaction Cost Parameters S4 Class
cov_est_method-class
Define the cov_est_method S4 Class
transactions_log-class
Define the transactions_log S4 Class

Portfolio construction methods

Weighting schemes from equal-weight to risk parity, hierarchical risk parity, mean-variance optimization (with resampling), and the micro-macro allocation framework, plus universe classification and trade generation.

set_portfolio_weights()
Set Portfolio Weights
create_hrp_portfolio()
Create a Hierarchical Risk Parity (HRP) portfolio
create_mvo_portfolio()
Create a MVO portfolio
create_resampled_mvo_portfolio()
Create a Resampled MVO portfolio
create_mmaf_portfolio()
Create a Micro–Macro Allocation Framework (MMAF) portfolio
classify_investment_universe()
Classify the universe based on signals and other custom and user-defined rules.
classify_stock_liquidity()
Classify stocks based on their liquidity
derive_stock_universe_m_d_ref()
Build Stock Universe with Expected Return Score
calculate_trade_orders()
Calculate Trade Orders
validate_exp_ret_score_tilt()
Valida exp_ret_score_tilt
add_rp_parameters()
Add rp_parameters to a backtest config
create_rp_parameters()
Create RP (Risk Parity) Parameters
add_hrp_parameters()
Add hrp_parameters to a backtest config
create_hrp_parameters()
Create HRP (Hierarchical Risk Parity) Parameters
add_mvo_parameters()
Add mvo_parameters to a backtest config
create_mvo_parameters()
Create MVO Parameters
add_mmaf_parameters()
Add mmaf_parameters to a backtest config
create_mmaf_parameters()
Create MMAF (Micro Macro Allocation Framework) Parameters
port-class signal_port-class stock_port-class
Portfolio classes for backtesting portfolios
rp_parameters-class
Define the rp_parameters S4 Class
hrp_parameters-class
Define the hrp_parameters S4 Class
mvo_parameters-class
Define the mvo_parameters S4 Class
mmaf_parameters-class
Define the mmaf_parameters S4 Class
mmaf_sub_port_config-class
MMAF Sub Portfolio Configuration

Workflow 2: Signal selection (the factor zoo)

Walk-forward inference on CAPM alpha with multiple-testing control (frequentist FWER / FDR) or hierarchical Bayesian partial pooling within themes, to decide which signals enter the portfolio.

create_ss_backtest_config()
Create an ss_backtest_config Object
run_ss_backtest()
Run Signal Selection Backtest
update_ss_backtest()
Update Signal Selection Backtest The update_ss_backtest function will take an existing port_backtest_results object and update it with new dates. This function is useful when you want to add new dates to an existing backtest without having to re-run the entire backtest.
add_alpha_test_strategy()
Add Alpha Test Strategy to ss_backtest_config
create_alpha_test_strategy()
Create an alpha_test_strategy object
get_alpha_test_strategy()
Get Alpha Test Strategy
add_bayesian_model_parameters()
Add Bayesian Model Parameters
create_bayesian_model_parameters()
Create Bayesian Model Parameters
get_bayesian_model_parameters()
Get Bayesian Model Parameters
add_brms_prior()
Add Prior to Bayesian Alpha Test Strategy
bayesian_adjustment()
Bayesian Adjustment Function
create_se_benchmarks()
Create Signal Engineering Benchmarks
create_performance_m_df()
Create a Performance Metrics Data Frame
ss_backtest_config-class
ss_backtest_config Class
ss_backtest_results-class
S4 Class for Signal Selection Backtest Results
alpha_test_strategy-class
alpha_test_strategy Class
frequentist_alpha_test_strategy-class
frequentist_alpha_test_strategy Class
bayesian_alpha_test_strategy-class
bayesian_alpha_test_strategy Class
bayesian_model_parameters-class
bayesian_model_parameters Class
signal_universe_m_df-class signal_universe_m_df
signal_universe_m_df-class
priors_m_df-class priors_m_df
priors_m_df-class

Workflow 3: Signal blending & machine learning

Combine the selected signals into one score per stock via heuristics (equal / signal-weighted, risk parity, HRP, MVO) or ML (glmnet, ranger, xgboost, keras) behind a single tuning and walk-forward interface, then stack blenders into meta-ensembles and interpret predictions.

create_sb_backtest_config()
Create sb_backtest_config Object
run_sb_backtest()
Run Signal Blending Backtest
update_sb_backtest()
Update Signal Blending Backtest
create_sb_metabacktest_config()
Create SB Meta Backtest Configuration
add_tuning_strategy()
Add a tuning_strategy to an Existing sb_backtest_config
create_tuning_strategy()
Hyperparameter Tuning Strategy Constructor
get_tuning_strategy()
Get Hyperparameter Tuning Strategy
is_tuning_strategy()
Define the is_hyperparameter_tuning_strategy function
add_hyperparameter()
Add a Hyperparameter to a hyper_grid_domain, whether inside a sb_backtest_config, a tuning_strategy or on its own.
add_hyper_grid_domain()
Add a hyper_grid_domain Object
is_hyper_grid_domain()
Check if an object is of class hyper_grid_domain
hyperparameters()
Get Expected Hyperparameters for a Machine Learning Algorithm or Configuration
add_keras_architecture()
Add Keras Architecture
add_keras_layer()
Add Layer to Keras Architecture
create_keras_architecture()
Create Keras Architecture
is_keras_architecture_parameters()
Define the is keras_architecture_parameters function
hyper_tune()
Perform Hyperparameter Tuning for Machine Learning Models
set_eval_function()
Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning
calculate_eval_metrics()
Calculate Out-of-Sample Evaluation Metrics
fit_keras_model()
Fit a Keras Neural Network Model
get_sb_algorithm() get_best_hyperparameters() get_model()
Accessor Methods for sb_model
select_and_correct_signals()
Select and Correct Signal Positions
convert_oos_list_to_m_df()
Convert OOS Lists to Meta Data Frame
explain_prediction()
Explain Prediction
sb_backtest_config-class
sb_backtest_config Class
sb_backtest_results-class
S4 Class for Time Series Walk-Forward Validation Results of Signal-Blending Models
sb_metabacktest_config-class
sb_metabacktest_config Class
sb_metabacktest_results-class
sb_metabacktest_results Class
sb_model-class
Define the sb_model S4 Class
tuning_strategy-class
Base Class for Hyperparameter Tuning Strategies
grid_search_strategy-class
Grid Search Tuning Strategy
random_search_strategy-class
Random Search Tuning Strategy
bayesian_opt_strategy-class
Bayesian Optimization Tuning Strategy
hyper_grid_domain-class
Define the hyper_grid_domain S4 Class
keras_architecture_parameters-class
Keras Architecture Parameters
signal_port_parameters-class
Signal Portfolio Parameters

Introspection & helpers

Utilities for discovering valid options and validating inputs.

display_valid_custom_objectives()
Display Valid Custom Objectives
display_eligibility_criteria()
Display Eligibility Criteria with Colors
check_consistent_dates()
Check for Consistent Dates in a Vector (Allowing NULLs)
check_inputs_sb_backtest()
Perform validation checks on inputs for SB workflow

S4 object methods

show, summary, plot, predict, and coercion methods defined for factoRverse objects.

show(<alpha_test_strategy>)
Show Alpha Test Strategy
show(<bayesian_alpha_test_strategy>)
Show Bayesian Alpha Test Strategy
show(<bayesian_model_parameters>)
Show Bayesian Model Parameters
show(<bayesian_opt_strategy>)
Show Method for bayesian_opt_strategy
show(<concentration_constraint_policy>)
Show Concentration Constraint Policy
show(<cov_est_method>)
Show Covariance Estimation Method
show(<frequentist_alpha_test_strategy>)
Show Frequentist Alpha Test Strategy
show(<grid_search_strategy>)
Show Method for grid_search_strategy
show(<groups_m_df>)
Show Method for groups_m_df Class
show(<hrp_parameters>)
Show HRP Parameters
show(<hyper_grid_domain>)
Print method for hyper_grid_domain
show(<keras_architecture_parameters>)
Print keras_architecture_parameters
show(<liquidity_constraint_policy>)
Show Liquidity Constraint Policy
show(<meta_dataframe>)
Show Method for meta_dataframe Class
show(<meta_xts>)
Show method for meta_xts
show(<metrics_meta_xts>)
Show method for metrics_meta_xts
show(<mmaf_parameters>)
Show MMAF Parameters
show(<mvo_parameters>)
Show MVO Parameters
show(<port>)
Show a port object
show(<port_backtest_cohort>)
Show Method for port_backtest_cohort Class
show(<port_backtest_config>)
Show Port Backtest Config
show(<port_backtest_results>)
Show Port Backtest Results
show(<random_search_strategy>)
Show Method for random_search_strategy
show(<returns_meta_xts>)
Show method for returns_meta_xts
show(<rp_parameters>)
Show Risk-Parity Parameters
show(<sb_backtest_config>)
Show SB Backtest Config
show(<sb_backtest_results>)
Show Method for sb_backtest_results Class
show(<sb_metabacktest_config>)
Show Method for sb_metabacktest_config Class
show(<sb_metabacktest_results>)
Show Method for sb_metabacktest_results Class
show(<sb_model>)
Show Method for sb_model Class
show(<signal_universe_m_df>)
Show Method for signal_universe_m_df Class
show(<ss_backtest_config>)
Show Signal Selection Backtest Config
show(<ss_backtest_results>)
Show Method for ss_backtest_results Class
show(<tickers_catalog>)
Print method for tickers_catalog
show(<transaction_costs_parameters>)
Show Transaction Cost Parameters
show(<tuning_strategy>)
Show Method for tuning_strategy
show(<turnover_constraint_policy>)
Show Turnover Constraint Policy
summary(<meta_dataframe>)
Summary for meta_dataframe
summary(<meta_xts>)
Summary Method for meta_xts Objects
summary(<port_backtest_cohort>)
Summary Method for port_backtest_cohort Class
summary(<port_backtest_results>)
Summary Method for port_backtest_results Class
summary(<sb_backtest_results>)
Summary Method for sb_backtest_results Class
summary(<sb_metabacktest_config>)
Summary Method for sb_metabacktest_config Class
summary(<sb_metabacktest_results>)
Summary Method for sb_metabacktest_results Class
summary(<ss_backtest_results>)
Summary Method for ss_backtest_results Class
summary(<tickers_catalog>)
Summary Method for tickers_catalog Class
plot(<bayesian_alpha_test_strategy>,<ANY>)
Plot Bayesian Alpha Test Strategy Priors
plot(<bayesian_opt_strategy>,<missing>)
Plot Method for bayesian_opt_strategy
plot(<grid_search_strategy>,<missing>)
Plot Method for grid_search_strategy
plot(<meta_dataframe>,<missing>)
Plot meta_dataframe
plot(<port>,<missing>)
Plot Method for 'port' Objects
plot(<port_backtest_cohort>,<ANY>)
Plot Method for port_backtest_cohort Class
plot(<port_backtest_config>,<missing>)
Plot Method for port_backtest_config: Faceted Liquidity Floor Cutoffs (Ordered Within Facets)
plot(<port_backtest_results>,<ANY>)
Plot Method for port_backtest_results Class
plot(<random_search_strategy>,<missing>)
Plot Method for random_search_strategy
plot(<sb_backtest_config>,<missing>)
Plot Method for sb_backtest_config
plot(<sb_backtest_results>,<ANY>)
Plot Signal Blending Walk-Forward Validation Results
plot(<sb_metabacktest_results>,<ANY>)
Plot Method for sb_metabacktest_results Class
plot(<sb_model>,<missing>)
Plot Method for 'sb_model' Objects
plot(<ss_backtest_results>,<ANY>)
Plot Method for ss_backtest_results Class
plot(<meta_xts>,<missing>)
Plot Method for meta_xts
plot(<ss_backtest_config>,<ANY>)
Plot Priors from ss_backtest_config
predict(<sb_backtest_results>)
Predict Method for sb_backtest_results Class
predict(<sb_model>)
Predict Method for sb_model Class and meta_dataframe
predict(<signal_port>)
Predict method for signal_port class
as.data.frame(<meta_dataframe>)
Coerce a meta_dataframe Object to Data Frame
as.data.frame(<meta_xts>)
Coerce a meta_xts Object to Data Frame
as.list(<concentration_constraint_policy>)
Turn a concentration_constraint_policy into a list
as.list(<keras_architecture_parameters>)
Convert Keras Architecture Parameters to List
as.list(<liquidity_constraint_policy>)
as.list Method for liquidity_constraint_policy S4 Class
as.list(<transaction_costs_parameters>)
as.list Method for transaction_costs_parameters S4 Class
as.list(<turnover_constraint_policy>)

`%>%`
Pipe operator

dofuture operator
